review_title: Efficiency with FastPass IVM: A New and Balanced Experience in Identity Verification
description: My overall experience with FastPass IVM has been positive. Adding more guidance or tutorials to its messages and workflows could be more better.
author: Sugam G.
pros: The greatest feature of FastPass IVM is its efficiency which makes identity verification process fast and easy, saving both time and resources. It gives the flexibility to adapt workflows, its use in multiple fields.
cons: Complex functionalities, which can take time for new users to learn and use. New users need to learn functions, before they can use all the functions properly.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Optimizing Inventory Control and Increasing Productivity
description: All things considered, FastPass IVM has revolutionized our company. It has increased productivity, cut expenses, and streamlined our inventory management procedures. FastPass IVM is an excellent option if you're searching for an IVM solution that is both robust and easy to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Staff members at various levels can easily learn how to use and navigate the platform. This cuts down on training time and guarantees that all users can make full use of the capabilities. The program can expand with our company and is adaptable enough to meet our unique requirements. FastPass IVM might be tailored to easily interface with our current systems.
cons: I don't think there's anything that I don't like about FastPass IVM

review_title: FastPass IVM is an effective way to secure helpdesk interactions
author: Almero S.
pros: FastPass IVM provides a "polite" way of introducing identity verification as part of an helpdesk interaction. This builds trust between both parties that services can be effectively rendered. It is as simple as possible since in most cases this can be seamlessly (as much as is allowed) integrated into the ITSM tool of choice.
cons: The initial learning curve on process configuration can be intimidating. Luckily there are sample setups that can be cloned or used, and verification processes can be designed to be simple at first and then be expanded as the company matures.

description: My job works perfectly and my client gives me more projects since our deal has 100% perfect.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I really like the most about this software is to easy to navigate just a couple clicks away you can get the result as easy as you can. Storing of personal information is really secured and getting verified who's the person pass the verification process is way to accurate. I can run my task with easy and no worries since it has 100% accurate database.
cons: I'cant fine any dislike about this software. The person develop this software made his job perfectly.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall experience is smooth and user-friendly. Yes, I would recommend to my partners.
author: Htway K.
pros: FastPass IVM is a real time problem solver which helps us feeling secure about identity verification. It also solved the problem of identifying employees when they talk to the service desk. Besides, it is also user-friendly software for beginners like us.
cons: Pricing system is a little bit high for us
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Verifying users identify in the Service Desk. Audits the process in our ITSM tool and wanrs about possible advesaries.
author: Bharat A.
pros: Focusing on security at the Service Desk, getting a controlled process for identifying end users was a big mess before IVM. We really like the product, the ability to handle different users with different proofing type and scores makes the product vore versatile.
cons: A bit har to understand as it is complex. Some steps are not that intuitive and it is hard to configure.

review_title: Flexible and secure, reliable user identity verification
author: Rishikesh M.
pros: Flexibility to do Identity Verification for different users and the integration to ServiceNow and It integrates smoothly with ServiceNow
cons: Documentation could be clearer, anothet thing i would say is initial configuration & understanding of features are challenging
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It is customized templates that I can use for cost effective and reducing risk of data breaches.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is now integrated with ServiceNow, having received certification which ensures robust protection against identity theft for me and my employees.
cons: I like that is it an essential tool for IT security that now enhances help desk security through advanced user identity.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, I love FastPass IVM it really helpfull for visitors check in check out process make it efficient, secure and user friendly.
author: Mutiara Putri D.
pros: I Like FastPass IVM because provides Robust Identify Verification method that can increase security and ensure only authorized visitors enter the premises.
cons: We may be resistant to changing from manual to automated systems and also require training for staff to use system effectively.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Solid End User Identity Validation covering all user
description: Very Satisfied, great product with great features
author: Jennifer Y.
pros: IVM is a versatile product that was able to embrace all of our 3000 users. Making sure to have a solid solution for normal situations that also covers users who forget their password and loose their phones. Integrated IVM to ServiceNow which works well
cons: For cases where escalation is necessary IVM automatically places tickets on another call group that then takes care of typically contacting the end-users manager to complete verufucation and also instructs the manager to let the user enroll

review_title: FastPass IVM is the only real solution
description: This software has been nothing but helpful, I’m very satisfied with the overall experience.
author: Bunga Shafa V.
pros: This is the best solution there is to the problem of identifying employees when they talk to the Service Desk. The decision not to integrate to our ITSM proves it the tool was rigid and stable enough. This software is absolutely helpful.
cons: I have nothing to dislike about FastPass IVM so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
